source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
sim'-e-on (Sumeon): the Revised Version (British and American) in Lu 3:30; Ac 13:1; 15:14 for the King James Version "Simeon" (which see). The persons are:

(1) An ancestor of Jesus (Lu 3:30).

(2) Symeon, called Niger, one of the prophets and teachers in the church at Antioch (Ac 13:1).

(3) For Simon Peter, see PETER; compare Ac 15:14.

See SIMEON, (4), (5), (6).
